CARD REWARD: Cut Through Fate vs Prostrate vs Evaluate

Cut Through Fate (1E, attack): I think this deals 7 damage and Scries 2 (look at top 2 cards, discard what you dont want). Damage + deck manipulation.

Prostrate (0E, skill): I think this gives 2 Mantra and 4 block. 0 cost is great. Mantra accumulates to 10 for Divinity stance (3x damage + 3 energy).

Evaluate (1E, skill): I think this gives 6 block and adds an Insight card to draw pile. Insight is a 0-cost card that draws 2. Block + future card draw.

All three are interesting. Cut Through Fate gives damage + Scry which helps deck consistency. Prostrate is 0-cost which is always good, and the Mantra mechanic could be powerful. Evaluate gives block + card draw.

I think Cut Through Fate is the best pick here. Its a 1E attack that deals decent damage AND Scries, helping me find my key cards (Eruption, Inner Peace, etc.). Its a strict upgrade over Strike in terms of value. The Scry helps avoid drawing Writhe or bad cards.

Prostrate is tempting at 0 cost but building Mantra to 10 requires multiple plays and I only have the one copy.

Cut Through Fate (1E, attack): I think this deals 7 damage and Scries 2 (look at top 2 cards, discard what you dont want). Damage + deck manipulation.

Prostrate (0E, skill): I think this gives 2 Mantra and 4 block. 0 cost is great. Mantra accumulates to 10 for Divinity stance (3x damage + 3 energy).

Evaluate (1E, skill): I think this gives 6 block and adds an Insight card to draw pile. Insight is a 0-cost card that draws 2. Block + future card draw.

All three are interesting. Cut Through Fate gives damage + Scry which helps deck consistency. Prostrate is 0-cost which is always good, and the Mantra mechanic could be powerful. Evaluate gives block + card draw.

I think Cut Through Fate is the best pick here. Its a 1E attack that deals decent damage AND Scries, helping me find my key cards (Eruption, Inner Peace, etc.). Its a strict upgrade over Strike in terms of value. The Scry helps avoid drawing Writhe or bad cards.

Prostrate is tempting at 0 cost but building Mantra to 10 requires multiple plays and I only have the one copy.
Taking Cut Through Fate - 1E attack with Scry. Damage + deck manipulation helps find key stance cards and avoid drawing Writhe. Better than a Strike in all situations.
Proceeding

F6 has only one option: Elite at x=2. No choice but to fight it.

At 51/72 HP (70%), this is somewhat risky. Act 1 elites are Gremlin Nob, Lagavulin, or Sentries.

My deck: 4 Strikes, 4 Defends, Eruption, Vigilance, Inner Peace, Flurry of Blows, Carve Reality, Cut Through Fate, Writhe curse = 15 cards.

Strengths: Stance loop with Eruption + Vigilance/Inner Peace. Carve Reality generates Smite. Cut Through Fate scries.
Weaknesses: Only 3E base, Writhe curse clogs hand, no Weak source.

Gremlin Nob punishes skills (gains Strength when you play skills). My deck has 7 skills... could be rough.
Lagavulin is a 3-turn grace period then heavy hits.
Sentries alternate block and attacks.

I have to take this fight. My deck is decent for floor 6. Tungsten Rod helps with chip damage. Lets go.

CARD REWARD: Cut Through Fate vs Protect vs Wreath of Flame

Cut Through Fate (1E, common): Already have one. Second copy would help with consistency but dilutes deck a bit.

Protect (2E, common skill): I think this gives 12 block with Retain. 12 block + Retain is very strong for a defensive option. Hold it until you need it.

Wreath of Flame (1E, uncommon skill): I think this gives your next attack +5 damage. Or maybe it adds fire damage to your next attack?

Actually, I think Wreath of Flame adds damage to your next Attack play. That synergizes amazingly with Wrath stance - the bonus damage would be doubled!

If Wreath of Flame gives +5 next attack and Im in Wrath, thats +10 effective damage.

I think Wreath of Flame is the pick for damage scaling, which I need for Hexaghost. But Im not 100% sure what it does.

Protect with Retain is also very good - it means I always have a 12-block card ready.

This is close between Wreath of Flame and Protect. For Hexaghost I need damage output more than defense. Taking Wreath of Flame.
